reviews.review_title: A Relaxing and Satisfying VR Puzzle!
reviews.review_description:
I really enjoyed this game!
The physics-based gameplay feels so satisfying — unscrewing parts, discovering hidden mechanisms, and watching the toy come apart piece by piece is surprisingly relaxing. The visuals are bright and cozy, and the whole experience helps to relieve stress after a long day. Highly recommended for fans of VR puzzles and calming games!

reviews.review_title: 🪛 Cozy Puzzle Fun With a Clever Twist
reviews.review_description:
Unscrew VR offers a simple idea with satisfying depth: dismantle wooden toys by unscrewing pieces in the correct order. You must identify and remove the right color screws, collect them in a basket, and match three of the same color to progress.

The toys can be rotated and examined from every angle to uncover hidden screws, encouraging careful observation and planning. Each part comes off one step at a time, making every successful move feel rewarding. With its cozy atmosphere, thoughtful puzzle design, and polished execution, Unscrew VR is a relaxing yet engaging experience that’s easy to pick up but surprisingly deep.

reviews.review_title: Amazing brain teaser game for cas gaming
reviews.review_description: I love tvis game and how i had to think and try to solve the puzzle its really fun and I would definitely recommend if u want to tease your brain a little and pass time, amazing developer and game i definitely recommend
I love this game. Finished in 1 day. Please do more levels developers.

One of the relaxing games that I play on my IPad, now in VR.

I enjoyed playing this.

A cozy game where you have to remove all the screws.
Really enjoying Unscrew VR so far! The mechanics feel very smooth and satisfying, and the objects are fun to take apart. It’s a chill puzzle game with a unique idea. Excited to see more updates!
